faq.q1: How do I add workers in bulk?
faq.a1: Go to Workers → Bulk upload, download the template, then upload your filled file.
faq.q2: How do I renew a policy?
faq.a2: Open the policy and tap Renew, or go to Buy / Renew.
faq.a3: Most claims are reviewed within 5–7 business days.
faq.a4: All receipts are under Documents and on each paid invoice.

settings.title: Settings

quote.note: Estimate only. Final premium is confirmed after underwriting.

faq.q1: How do I renew my policy?
faq.a1: Open the policy and tap Renew, or go to Buy.
faq.q2: How do I file a claim?
faq.a2: Go to Claims → New claim and follow the steps.
faq.a3: Most claims are reviewed within 5–7 business days.
faq.a4: All policy documents and receipts are under Documents.

faq.a1: Commission is a percentage of each policy's premium, based on your current tier.
faq.q2: How do I move up a tier?
faq.a2: Tiers are based on cumulative sales YTD — see the Agent tier page for thresholds.
faq.q3: How do I convert a lead?
faq.a3: Open the lead in Leads and tap Convert to client.
faq.a4: Approved commissions are paid monthly; see Payout history under Commissions.

hero.title: Foreign worker insurance, done in minutes
hero.subtitle: Cover one worker or hundreds in a single order — compliant, instant, and fully digital.

why.title: Built for employers
why.desc: Bulk upload your whole workforce and insure everyone at once.

why.title: Compliant by default
why.desc: Coverage meets Ministry of Labour requirements for migrant workers.

why.title: Manage from one place
why.desc: Renewals, claims and worker cards all live in your portal.

faq.q: Can I insure many workers at once?
faq.a: Yes — use bulk upload to add your whole roster from a spreadsheet, then pay once.

faq.q: How fast is the policy issued?
faq.a: E-policies and worker cards are issued within 24 hours, usually instantly.

faq.q: Is this accepted for work permits?
faq.a: Yes — coverage meets the requirements for migrant-worker permits in Thailand.
Yes — add or renew workers any time from your business portal.

hero.title: Car insurance, compared in one place
hero.subtitle: Compare live premiums from leading insurers and buy the plan that fits.

why.title: Compare real prices
why.desc: Side-by-side premiums from multiple insurers, updated live.

why.title: Garage or dealer
why.desc: Choose where your car gets repaired — we filter for you.

why.title: Claims made simple
why.desc: File and track claims from your account, anytime.

faq.a: Leading Thai insurers including Viriyah, Dhipaya, Bangkok Insurance and more.
Yes — filter by garage or authorised dealer repair when comparing.
File a claim from your account and track its status in real time.

hero.title: Travel insurance for every trip
hero.subtitle: Medical, baggage and trip protection at home and abroad.

why.title: Worldwide medical
why.desc: Emergency treatment and evacuation wherever you travel.

why.title: Trip protection
why.desc: Cancellations, delays and lost baggage covered.

why.title: Buy in minutes
why.desc: Pick dates, get a price, and you're covered instantly.

faq.a: Both are available — choose what fits how often you travel.
Standard and Premium plans include overseas COVID medical cover.
From your selected start date, right after purchase.

hero.title: Health insurance that has your back
hero.subtitle: Inpatient and outpatient cover for you and your family.

why.title: Real medical cover
why.desc: Hospital stays, surgery and outpatient visits covered.

why.title: Wide hospital network
why.desc: Cashless treatment at partner hospitals nationwide.

why.title: Renew with ease
why.desc: Manage renewals and claims from your account.

faq.a: Standard waiting periods apply for certain conditions — details at checkout.
Yes — add dependants when you build your quote.
Cashless at network hospitals; reimbursement elsewhere.

hero.title: Fire & property insurance

why.title: Property protection

why.title: Home or commercial
why.desc: Plans for houses, condos and business premises.

faq.a: Houses, condos and commercial premises are all eligible.
Standard and Premium plans include natural-disaster cover.

faq.q: How is the sum insured set?
faq.a: Based on your property's rebuild value — we guide you at quote.

compliance.noFees: No join or recruitment fees — you earn override income only on your team's real, licensed policy sales.

recruit.title: Recruit
recruit.desc: Grow your team with licensed sub-agents.
recruit.inviteDesc: Share to invite a licensed agent to your team.
recruit.name: Full name
recruit.licenseHint: Required — sub-agents must hold a valid OIC broker license.
recruit.gateDesc: {name} was added as pending. They start earning — and contribute to your override — only once their OIC license is verified.

income.title: Team Income
income.desc: Override on your team's licensed GWP.
income.pendingDesc: These members' licenses are unverified, so they earn 0 and add 0 to your override until verified.

tier.note: Your rank reflects both your personal sales and your team's licensed production.
